action: Marked the source conv_id as ready, indicating that all required videos and metadata have been successfully stored and the content block is finalized for delivery or access.
fallback_action: If marking as ready fails, retry up to three times; if unsuccessful after retries, notify the user for manual resolution.

recipe.steps: Update the status of the source conv_id in memory or tracking system to 'ready' after verifying all required data is stored.
